top_signals.title: Stocks Face Rising Risk With Mega AI Deals Ready to Flood Market
top_signals.summary: A flood of new shares from companies looking to fund their artificial intelligence ambitions is raising questions on Wall Street about whether there will be enough buyers to soak them all up and what this pile of fresh equity will mean for stock prices more broadly.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Etihad Airways CEO on Competition & Asian Market Growth
top_signals.summary: Etihad Airways CEO Antonoaldo Neves speaks at the International Air Transport Association (IATA) on EU carrier advantages, growing Asian traffic, and competition. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
